---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for vexobj
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Describe the problem you are trying to solve or the workflow this feature would enable.

Example: "I need to serve images with automatic blur-hash placeholders, so my frontend can show low-quality previews while the full image loads."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you think this could work. Include API surface, config options, or CLI flags if relevant.

```
# Example API call or config snippet
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them briefly.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
